s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FOG LIGHT ASSEMBLY LH (w/ Fog Light)

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw and the fog light assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FOG LIGHT ASSEMBLY RH (w/ Fog Light)
REMOVE FRONT SPOILER (w/ Front Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and 25 clips.
Disengage the 17 claws and remove the front spoiler.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER EXTENSION LH (w/ Front Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and front bumper extension LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER EXTENSION RH (w/ Front Spoiler)
REMOVE FRONT BUMPER EXTENSION MOUNTING BRACKET (w/ Bracket)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the front bumper extension mounting bracket.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER LOWER COVER (w/ Cover)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and remove the front bumper lower cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER LH (w/o Fog Light)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and remove the front bumper hole cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER RH (w/o Fog Light)
REMOVE FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER LH (w/ Fog Light)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and remove the front bumper hole cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER RH (w/ Fog Light)
REMOVE LOWER RADIATOR GRILLE

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 14 claws and remove the lower radiator grille.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RADIATOR GRILLE

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws.
Disengage the 16 claws and remove the radiator grille.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE HOOD TO FRONT END PANEL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Remove the 10 clips and hood to front end panel seal.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER UPPER RETAINER

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 clips and front bumper upper retainer.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RADIATOR GRILLE EMBLEM

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 4 claws and remove the radiator grille emblem.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER ENERGY ABSORBER

s2.ptxt: Remove the front bumper energy absorber from the front bumper reinforcement sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER REINFORCEMENT SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage each clamp.
Remove the 6 bolts and front bumper reinforcement sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER SIDE RETAINER LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the screw.
Disengage the claw and remove the front bumper side retainer LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT BUMPER SIDE RETAINER RH
